summary: Final 4 pages of 25-screen blueprint verified. All pages load correctly with proper UI elements, charts, and interactions. Net Worth Trend, Debt Paydown Planner, Insurance Gap Analysis, and Revenue & Billing pages are fully functional. Frontend uses MOCK data generated locally - no backend API endpoints for these specific features.

issues: Console warning about chart width/height being -1 - cosmetic issue, charts still render correctly

passed_tests: Net Worth Trend page loads at /net-worth-trend
Net Worth Trend - Current Net Worth displayed ($1,943,132)
Net Worth Trend - Time range selector (6 Months, 1 Year, 2 Years, 5 Years)
Net Worth Trend - Chart type selector (Area, Line)
Net Worth Trend - Net Worth Over Time chart renders correctly
Net Worth Trend - Best Month and Worst Month cards displayed
Net Worth Trend - About Net Worth Tracking info card
Debt Paydown Planner page loads at /debt-paydown
Debt Paydown - Total Debt displayed ($967,000)
Debt Paydown - Debt-Free Date displayed (Feb 2053 with default settings)
Debt Paydown - Avalanche/Snowball strategy toggle works
Debt Paydown - Extra payment slider works ($0-$2,000 range)
Debt Paydown - Slider interaction updates debt-free date (Dec 2047 with $1,500 extra)
Debt Paydown - Debt Payoff Projection chart renders
Debt Paydown - Your Debts section shows 3 debts (Home Mortgage, Investment Loan, Car Loan)
Debt Paydown - Strategy explanation card
Insurance Gap Analysis page loads at /insurance-gap
Insurance Gap - Protection Score badge displayed (28/100)
Insurance Gap - Your Situation inputs (Age, Annual Income, Years to Retirement, Dependents, Total Debt, Annual Expenses)
Insurance Gap - Coverage Comparison chart (horizontal bar chart)
Insurance Gap - 4 insurance type cards (Life, Income Protection, TPD, Trauma/Critical Illness)
Insurance Gap - Coverage Level progress bars with percentages
Insurance Gap - Coverage Gap alerts with recommendations
Insurance Gap - Adjust Current Coverage inputs
Insurance Gap - Insurance Recommendations summary
Insurance Gap - Important Note disclaimer
Revenue & Billing page loads at /revenue-billing
Revenue & Billing - Total AUM displayed ($89,500,000)
Revenue & Billing - YTD Revenue displayed ($1,306,678)
Revenue & Billing - This Month revenue with % change
Revenue & Billing - Avg Fee per Client displayed ($27,802)
Revenue & Billing - Time range selector (3, 6, 12 Months)
Revenue & Billing - Export button
Revenue & Billing - Revenue Trend stacked area chart
Revenue & Billing - Revenue by Service pie chart
Revenue & Billing - Top Clients by Revenue list (Patel, Wheeler, Chen families)
Revenue & Billing - Recent Invoices table with status badges
Revenue & Billing - Adviser Performance section (from practice-overview API)
Important Information modal appears on first visit
Modal contains ASIC Regulatory Guide 234 reference
Modal contains No Financial Services License disclaimer
Modal contains Tax Information Disclaimer with ATO reference
Modal contains No Liability disclaimer
Modal contains Before making financial decisions checklist
Navigation - Net Worth Trend link in Personal Mode sidebar (OVERVIEW section)
Navigation - Debt Paydown link in sidebar (PLANNING section)
Navigation - Insurance Gap link in sidebar (PLANNING section)
Navigation - Revenue & Billing link in Adviser Mode sidebar (REPORTS section)
Mode switching works (Personal Mode ↔ Adviser Mode)
GET /api/enterprise/practice-overview - Returns 200 with practice data
critical_code_review_comments: Frontend pages use locally generated mock data - no backend API endpoints for /api/trends/net-worth, /api/planning/debt-paydown, /api/planning/insurance-gap, /api/billing/revenue
This is acceptable for MVP as the calculations are done client-side using portfolio context data
seed_data_creation: None - used existing mock data from portfolio context
context_for_next_testing_agent: Final 4 pages of 25-screen blueprint verified. Net Worth Trend at /net-worth-trend shows historical net worth with time range and chart type selectors. Debt Paydown Planner at /debt-paydown has avalanche/snowball toggle and extra payment slider. Insurance Gap Analysis at /insurance-gap shows protection score and coverage comparison. Revenue & Billing at /revenue-billing (Adviser Mode only) shows AUM, revenue trends, and client fees. All pages use MOCKED frontend data - not connected to backend APIs. Compliance modal appears on first visit - set localStorage key 'wheeler_compliance_acknowledged' to bypass.

net_worth_trend_page.data_source: MOCKED - Frontend generates historical data from portfolio context
features: Change over time period with percentage
Net Worth Over Time chart with Assets and Net Worth
Best Month and Worst Month cards

debt_paydown_planner_page.data_source: MOCKED - Frontend calculates from hardcoded debt data
features: Your Debts list with focus debt indicator

insurance_gap_analysis_page.data_source: MOCKED - Frontend calculates recommendations from user inputs
features: Your Situation inputs (age, income, retirement, dependents, debt, expenses)
4 insurance type cards (Life, Income Protection, TPD, Trauma)

revenue_billing_page.data_source: MOCKED - Frontend generates revenue data, practice-overview from backend

features: Appears on first visit to financial pages

personal_mode: Net Worth Trend in OVERVIEW section

mocked_apis_confirmed: Net Worth Trend - Frontend generates historical data from portfolio.summary.netWorth
Debt Paydown Planner - Frontend calculates from hardcoded debt array
Insurance Gap Analysis - Frontend calculates recommendations from user inputs and portfolio context
Revenue & Billing - Frontend generates revenue data, only practice-overview from backend API
